---
title: "Check model fit with various initial values"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
  number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F, fig.height = 3, fig.width = 6)
```

- Use ${\color{red} c} \times price$ as a starting point when solving for equilibrium.
- Use exact residuals, so all the points should be on the 45 degree line if successfully solved.
- Convergence status:
  1. Function criterion is near zero.
  2. x-values within tolerance.
  3. No better point found.
  
# {.tabset}

## Linear

### $c=0.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear/0.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear/0.5/fee.png")
```


### $c=1.2$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear/1.2/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear/1.2/fee.png")
```



### $c=1.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear/1.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear/1.5/fee.png")
```




### $c=3.0$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear/3.0/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear/3.0/fee.png")
```

## Log

### $c=0.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log/0.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log/0.5/fee.png")
```


### $c=1.2$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log/1.2/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log/1.2/fee.png")
```



### $c=1.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log/1.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log/1.5/fee.png")
```




### $c=3.0$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log/3.0/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log/3.0/fee.png")
```



## Log-linear

### $c=0.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear/0.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear/0.5/fee.png")
```


### $c=1.2$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear/1.2/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear/1.2/fee.png")
```



### $c=1.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear/1.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear/1.5/fee.png")
```




### $c=3.0$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear/3.0/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear/3.0/fee.png")
```



## Linear (ridge)

### $c=0.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear_ridge/0.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear_ridge/0.5/fee.png")
```


### $c=1.2$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear_ridge/1.2/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear_ridge/1.2/fee.png")
```



### $c=1.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear_ridge/1.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear_ridge/1.5/fee.png")
```




### $c=3.0$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear_ridge/3.0/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/linear_ridge/3.0/fee.png")
```

## Log (ridge)

### $c=0.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_ridge/0.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_ridge/0.5/fee.png")
```


### $c=1.2$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_ridge/1.2/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_ridge/1.2/fee.png")
```



### $c=1.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_ridge/1.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_ridge/1.5/fee.png")
```




### $c=3.0$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_ridge/3.0/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_ridge/3.0/fee.png")
```



## Log-linear (ridge)

### $c=0.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear_ridge/0.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear_ridge/0.5/fee.png")
```


### $c=1.2$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear_ridge/1.2/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear_ridge/1.2/fee.png")
```



### $c=1.5$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear_ridge/1.5/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear_ridge/1.5/fee.png")
```




### $c=3.0$

#### Wage and Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear_ridge/3.0/wage.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/various_initial_values/log_linear_ridge/3.0/fee.png")
```
